description: Monitoring dashboard for Bitcoin Core Fullnode & Hashi Node.

panels.description: Number of connected Bitcoin P2P peers. A value of 0 means no peers are connected; check trusted peer configuration and network reachability.
panels.title: ❗Kyoto BTC Peers❗

panels.description: Indicates whether Hashi is currently reconfiguring the MPC committee. If it remains active for more than 10 minutes, check DKG/rotation logs for errors.
panels.title: ❗Reconfig in Progress❗

panels.description: Indicates whether the Kyoto Bitcoin light client is synced. If unsynced for more than 5 minutes, check Bitcoin RPC and P2P connectivity.
panels.title: ❗ Kyoto Synced❗

panels.description: Total number of MPC signing failures since the node process started. Any increase may indicate MPC protocol issues and should be investigated in the logs.
panels.title: ❗MPC Sign Failures [1h]❗

panels.description: Percentage of Kyoto Bitcoin light client synchronization progress. 100% indicates the Kyoto light client is fully synced.
panels.title: ❗ Kyoto Sync❗

panels.description: Number of presignatures currently available in the local MPC signing pool. A value of 0 means the node cannot sign. Check reconfig status and MPC logs.
panels.title: ❗Presigs Left❗

panels.description: 50th, 95th, and 99th percentile durations of MPC reconfiguration operations, including DKG and rotation.
panels.title: DKG/MPC Reconfig Duration

title: Hashi Node & Bitcoin Core Fullnode
